msg: warning: Variable codec_hw_write is a dead store!
reasoning: Line 16 is 'int codec_hw_write = i2c_master_send;' in da7210_init(). The value is assigned but never read (function immediately does 'return 0') — a genuine dead store when CONFIG_I2C is defined (so i2c_master_send exists). However, when !CONFIG_I2C, i2c_master_send is undeclared and line 16 fails to compile — the vbdb-documented UndeclaredIdentifier bug for (SND_FSI_AK4642||SND_FSI_DA7210)&&!I2C. The presence condition (def(CONFIG_SND_FSI_DA7210)|def(CONFIG_SND_SOC_DA7210)) does not require def(CONFIG_I2C), so it includes configs where the code can't compile. True dead store only in configs where CONFIG_I2C is also defined. Condition should be (def(CONFIG_SND_FSI_DA7210)|def(CONFIG_SND_SOC_DA7210))&&def(CONFIG_I2C). New true positive, over-constrained.
